title: OP Jungle Temple loot
body:
# Insane Jungle Temple Loot Do you like LOOT? Do you like Jungle Temples? If so, this mod pack is for you! It makes that increadibly hard to find jengle temples worth your time.

FEATURES INCLUDED ARE

  • No more rotten flesh
  • No more bones
  • More Diamonds
  • POG LOOT
  • All slots full
  • AND MUCH MORE
# Info/Contact

Click here for discord!

Contact me at "abstractmelons@gmail.com" OR "abstractmelon#0115"

We hope you enjoy the mod :)
